game.short_text: Run n gun where you chase a Boss to save your fluffy friend.
game.title: Tuff Fluff

details.title: Tuff Fluff
details.description:
The main character is always on edge and the only way to calm him down is the comfort of "Fluffy" his bunny friend and their carrots.A run n gun a la Contra where you chase a Boss through multiple stages.My submission to the Vimjam2, I finished 3rd out of 416 submissions and #2 for fun and design :DI made a devlog video about my process:

Vimlark talking about the game (3:58):

Using music made by Steven MelinAllowing me to finish #4 in "Music/Sound" go check their stuff, it's great.


POST JAM CHANGES:
v1.01:- Fixed the random crash on level load and removed the disclaimer.- Added W, D-Pad Up & Left Stick Up as alternate jump inputs- Improved gamepad controls- Fixed "damage saws" that were often behind the foggy background making them hard to see, leading to some frustrating hits- Added transition screens for level transitions and death respawn- Added a master volume option and made the default value quieter- Added a tutorial box to explain the "jump through platform"- Added input buffering for the jump- Made carrots bounce off "damage saws" so the player don't get hit when trying to heal- Auto scrolling parallax background in Level 2 so it looks like the train is moving- Bug fix: getting pushed off a platform by the auto scrolling camera would make you float in the air- Bug fix: the first chase would not trigger if the player stand close to the left wall until they go forward- Bug fix: jumping right when bouncing on a jump pad would throw you in a "super jump" very high and outside the camera view- Bug fix: "damage saws" could block the player's projectile- Bug fix: there was a delay of one frame between the lower body and upper body turning around, leading to an ugly frame, specially visible with arms crossed- Fixed platform tiles on Level 2 & 4 that were not using the edge tile on the edges- Fixed some text errors
v1.02:- Added a shoot visual effect- Added an easy difficultyv1.03- Changed the fixed 60 FPS to a clamped to Max 60 FPS, so lower end computers don't have a "slow motion" when they can't reach 60 FPS and it still helps streamers to not have Unreal taking over their computer.There is no difference between the .rar and .zip, just different formats for what's more convenient for you.1. Extract the .rar or .zip2. Run TuffFluff.exeThe game requires the DirectX 10 redist, which is kind of standard for Windows games so most people should have it. If you have an error saying something about "DX10" you should download the DirectX 10 redist.

game.short_text: A Pachinko-themed roguelike strategy game
game.title: Plinko Panic! - DEMO

details.title: Plinko Panic! - DEMO
details.description:
PLINKO PANIC!
Barrel through dungeons of enemies by strategically choosing 1 of currently 90 different pinballs from the shop each turn, hitting pegs to deal damage, gain some extra money and heal yourself when needed.
Plinko Panic is a tough, strategic pachinko roguelike... The current version of the game has you go through 4 enemies before facing a boss. The enemies are certainly tough, and if you're defeated your run is then over, use the synergies you can make with the pinballs to your advantage which changes the way you defeat them.
'Plinko Panic!' is now released in early access on steam! The itch page is no longer receiving updates, but there has been plenty of updates made in the steam version than in this one, including 18 ADDITIONAL levels to play through!
Current Features
90 different pinballs to choose from, all of different rarities.19 different passive items to choose from at the end of each minor fight.5 small enemies and 3 bosses to fight up against, each having their own effects (hover over the enemies to see).Shop with different upgradable levels.3 different pachinko boards to randomly get assigned at the start of the game.Multiple unlockable difficulties for the 'Cave' area
To join my DISCORD and maybe even help out and give your feedback on the game >>CLICK HERE<<
All assets were created by me or used from libraries I have the license to use.

game.short_text: Made for Vimjam2 2021
game.title: Dungeons and Axes

details.title: Dungeons and Axes
details.description:
Dungeons and Axes is a small roguelike inspired in Downwell and Undertale  that is played only with the mouse. You are a little goblin and  your objective is to overcome 5 stages where there will be enemies that will not make it so easy for you. Improve your skills as you progress and fight the final BOSS to win.
I recommend playing the downloadable versions for a better experience.
The game was created in just 3 days for Vimjam2, so if you find any bug, report it to me as quickly as possible.

The theme of the jam was "on the edge" and the game had to have a boss.

That's all, if you like the game you can leave me a comment, that encourages me to continue making games, thanks for everything :)

game.short_text: These adventurers keep trying to take your loot. Are you going to let that happen?
game.title: ZERGSLAYER

details.title: ZERGSLAYER
details.description:
You're a giant worm doing giant worm things, like terrorizing the coast, but those pesky adventurers want to kill you for your loot! That's unacceptable.
"AAHADFIKDFHSKJFDS" - Worm
(Translation: If I'm going down, I'm taking you all with me!)


This is a demo made in about one week for a jam. Expect a small playable game with room for future updates. We are planning to update it after!


**Video of the game being played by Patrickgh3!**


Instructions
Arrows: move1234: skills (unlock more at lower health)R: restartEnter or mouse: menus
Skills
Skills are unlocked in order from 1-4 when health is lower. Icon background tells you if you can use it underground or in the air.
1 (spit): fire damaging projectile into the air.2 (flop): destroy structures.3 (speed up): burst of speed and invulnerability.4 (husk): spit a monster that attacks adventurers and last 15 seconds. Eating it restores health. You can spawn more than one.


Credits
Everything made by us in about a week. No premade assets. 
Rulste: Programmer/designerScorpakwal: Pixel artist/sound designer (channel)Aprahcot: Pixel artist


Tips
Don't hit the force fields on structures, they do damage!You can shoot the dragon out of the air and destroy kegs at 75% health (skill 1).Everything except the sound wave can be destroyed at 25% health (skill 3).Playing risky and unlocking skills gives more  ways to deal with adventurers   and higher scores, but if you start getting overwhelmed, you can play it   safe by gaining health.The game goal is a high score, and is meant to take a couple rounds to get the hang of and discover the strategies we designed.


High score
Can you beat the high score? Currently held by FurieuxFrangins



Themes
This is originally made for Vimjam2. This is our first time doing this contest!

"Boss"
    
You play as the boss, destroying as much as you can before you die. Directly inspire by things like Tremors, GW2, etc.

"On the edge"
    
As the boss, you get stronger the lower your health. Gain new  skills to fight off an endlessly respawning horde of adventurers.  Players can decide if they want to play risky or safe, by controlling  amount of health.

game.short_text: First day coffee delivery service around the block
game.title: Around The Block

details.title: Around The Block
details.description:
"I can't believe I get to work under the most famous coffee shop owner!" 
In a world where the planet is cube-shaped and there's a need for coffee and other café commodities, bringing forth a delivery service is paramount! 
In Around The Block, you play as Neko, a starstruck newbie café employee, working under the famous Oz, the boss that runs the place. You must deliver coffee shop food and drink to the different residents of the world - and to do so on this planet, you must venture on the edge of a face of the cube to traverse to the next face. Be quick, though - if you fail to deliver more than three orders on time, you'll be fired!



Brayden/StraightUpGruntled (https://straightupgruntled.itch.io/, https://twitch.tv/straightupgruntled) Programming, Music

game.short_text: Fast-paced time management strategy game! Build teams, decorate the office and keep workers happy
game.title: Bossa Nova

details.title: Bossa Nova
details.description:
In this fast-paced, time management strategy game, you’re the boss of a company on the edge of bankruptcy. 
Get busy building teams and decorating your office - But watch out! Your workers' likes and dislikes of their surroundings affect their productivity. And over time, their mood decreases until they’re on the edge of leaving your company. (Unless you make them feel appreciated, that is!) 

Can you keep your teams happy and reach your Investor Goals before the end of the week? See how far you can bring your business!
Created for VimJam 2021. 


How to Play the Game

Build teams as fast as you can - The more teams with an Engineer, Marketer, and Sales worker that you have, the faster you can make money to reach your goal. Click on the dollar signs at the edges of any team to purchase a new team space. Check the “phone” to hire your new team.
Manage your employees - Check emails and alert bubbles to keep your employees happy and comfortable in their workplace. When a bubble with a ! appears, find the employee and click on the bubble - if you don’t click on it within the hour, their happiness will decrease. You can increase their happiness again by buying an item they like for their area.Hire a manager - Once you have several teams, hiring a manager on a team will help you keep your employees happy by automatically clicking on their alert bubbles.
Employees can quit - If their happiness goes runs out, the employee will quit their job and you’ll have to hire a new worker for the team to continue making money.
Buy items - Visit the shop to buy items for your employees. You can select item and color, then click to purchase for that team. If you choose items they like, their productivity will increase (and they’ll make more money)!
Transfer or fire employees - If a worker doesn’t like their surroundings, their productivity goes down! Click on their avatar within the “phone” to transfer them to a new team with an open space or fire them so they don’t bring the team down.
Promote employees - After a few days, you can promote an employee to increase their level, making more money for you!
Reach your Revenue (R) goal before the end of day 5 - Spend as much as you’d like, but make sure you reach your R goal before the Investor Meeting at the end of day 5!


How to Download the Game

Look for the file called “Bossa Nova” with no suffix extensions. If you’re prompted to extract files, select to extract all. If something like Windows Defender pops up, click More Info and select Run Away.


The Team:

iNightfall: Design, ProgrammingProfJules: Art, Design, Writing

Traverse the treacherous toy box as the titular toy "Jumpin' Jac Dash." Help Jac in his quest to find his broken pieces, buried in the cluttered box. His hopes are high that he will be played with again once he has put himself back together.  His future hinges on his courage and the final decision of the boss of the toy world.

game.short_text: ​Monke pizza restaraunt simulator
game.title: VimJam2 - Monke Pizza

details.title: VimJam2 - Monke Pizza
details.description:
Monke pizza restaurant simulator.
You are always on the edge of being fired. That is if you work here. Otherwise you are on the edge of being hired. Because that is how BOSS is bossing
You will probably need some friends as this game is multiplayer. Or you can open two windows to play with yourself. Game has no purpose, just enjoy eating/cooking pizza.
PRESS T to TOGGLE SHOWING PLAYER NAMES

Use WASD / Arrow keys to move around
Some players play as customers while others play as cooks
When you are a cook you will have a badge saying "WORK"
To cook a pizza, first grab dough, then add some ingredients, then cook using the oven.
Then you can give pizza to a customer if the ingredients match. If you make mistake, use trash can to start from scratch
To order a pizza when playing as customer, sit on a chair, then select the ingredients you want in your pizza, then click the order button to order. Then sit strait until a pizza is delivered to you. If you leave your seat, the order will be canceled (btw leave your seat by pressing movement keys).
BOSS likes to make changes to how restaurant works. Sometimes he feels the need to fire a monke and hire another one. When this happens, an employed monke with the least amount of cooked pizza will be fired, and the monke that was unemployed for longest time will be hired.
Source code: https://github.com/kuviman/vim-jam/

game.short_text: Abstract fight into colours - Vim Jam 2 entry
game.title: Public Abstract Void (PAV)

details.title: Public Abstract Void (PAV)
details.description:
Enter an abstract world inspired by the XXth century painting abstract movement and fight the dark entity to defend your right to a colourful life
This is a boss fight were you will need to dodge numerous attacks and buff you up  by harmonizing yourself with the colours you find in the environment
Find symbiosis with the right colours will buff your character in different ways : find your favorite and embrace its energy to defeat the nothingness, the eternal silence without hope, Death
commands to dashstand on a coloured abstraction to enter in symbiosis and play its mini game to gain the corresponding time limited buff!
A big thank you to VimLark for playing our game on stream! welcome everyone, hope you'll enjoy the game :)
Here's a quick explanation of the buffs :
YELLOW raises the RANGE of your shooting ; if you go at the bottom of the screen, you still hit the boss!BLUE raises your DAMAGE, it shows by the bigger projectiles RED raises your SPEED movementbuffs last a few seconds during which you can't enter another colour, be patient!Public Abstract Void (PAV) is a jam game developed for the VimJam2 by three people

game.short_text: Destroy the invading alien lords. Live on the edge and do more damage? or play it safe and test your endurance?
game.title: RIMSHOT

details.title: RIMSHOT
details.description:
RIMSHOT is a small boss rush game made for VIMJAM2. In RIMSHOT you fly your spaceship around the edge of a black-hole where giant alien kaiju are entering our universe. Can you save our universe from the terrors of the unknown?
The jam had a focus of "BOSS" and a theme  of "ON THE EDGE."
To implement the focus, we made a boss rush game. To implement the theme, we used 2 methods. 1. Your ship is tethered the edge of a black-hole. 2. The closer to the edge of destruction that your ship is, the more bullets the ship fires, and at a faster rate of fire as well. 

HOW TO PLAY - There are instruction in game if you don't want to continue readying.
CONTROLS - use A & D or Left and Right Arrow keys to move around the edge of the black-hole. Use Spacebar to shoot the ships cannons, you can hold it down.
GAME-PLAY = There are 3 bosses of increasing difficulty. After defeating a boss, you can choose a power-up to assist you in the next battle. Use it wisely, and you only get to use it once. 

This game was made by clonethirteen and Spacespy. You can find links to our pages below. To make the game we used Construct 3, Aseprite, FL Studio, Splice, Jsfxr.

https://clonethirteen.itch.io/   https://twitter.com/_clonethirteen
https://spacespy64.itch.io/       https://twitter.com/spacespy_tv

game.short_text: To collect the rare Agnolitas, you'll need to face an acid cave on a hostile planet.
game.title: Agnolita

details.title: Agnolita
details.description:
Game made for VIMJAM 2  in 10 days, i can't do all the things i would like to do within this time but i did my best, i hope you have fun!
You are Alicia, and your mission is to collect a rare type of ore called Agnomalia in the dangerous caves of Udronus. Walk in the edge of acid pools, take the five Agnolitas and get out of this place, cause your boss have more missions to you.
Select the CONTROL TYPE in the OPTIONS SCREEN. You can choose between "KEYBOARD A" (Arrow keys to move), "KEYBOARD B" (WASD to move) and JOYSTICK.


(KEYBOARD A)
MOVE: Arrow Keys
ATTACK: X
LOCK POSITION: Z
DODGE: CPAUSE/MAP: Enter

(KEYBOARD B)

MOVE: W, A, S, D
ATTACK: Shift
LOCK POSITION: Ctrl
DODGE: SpacePAUSE/MAP: Enter
Game by Róger Goulart (Instagram: @roger_goulart)

game.short_text: An intense, high-skill action platformer!
game.title: Isadora's Edge

details.title: Isadora's Edge
details.description:
=== Controls ===
IMPORTANT: Don't run the game at 144Hz, run at 60Hz for best experience! The dash logic shortens your dash length without respect to the difference in time, and I forgot to lock the game at 60fps, so the game becomes MUCH harder at higher frame-rates!
NOTE: Dashing grants you invincibility frames for the duration of the dash! Don't know if that's clear enough or not from the gameplay, so just a heads up to make the game a little easier for ya'll!
Control Scheme 1Movement - Left Arrow, Right ArrowJump - Up ArrowAttack - Spacebar or ZDash - Shift or X
Control Scheme 2Movement - A, DJump - WAttack - J or Left Mouse ButtonDash - K or Right Mouse Button
=== Description ===
Thanks for taking a look at my game! This was made over a period of 10 days for VimJam2, hosted by VimLark and 8 Bits to Infinity! The restriction was to have a boss, and the optional theme was "on the edge"! I hope you enjoy playing it, because I had an absolute BLAST making it.
Huge shoutout to @insandio for doing the voice acting for Isadora, as well as making the music for the game!Huge shoutout to @extranji for playtesting extensively to help me tweak the balance as well as finding any bugs!

details.title: Edge Knight!
details.description:
Introduction
Edge Knight! is a 2D action shooter with unique Edge mechanic, you play as a knight, going to dungeon and fight against monsters that shoot you with bullet, use the Edge Power to defense yourself and beat evil creature!
Control
WASD - Move
Mouse Drag: Create Edge
Mouse Drag on Edge: Shoot Edge
R - Reset game

This game is submitted to VimJam 2: Boss [8 Bits to Infinity]
We use prebuilt asset：
16x16 DungeonTileset II by 0x72 (itch.io)
Pixel Art Top Down - Basic by Cainos (itch.io)
Pixel Health Bar Asset Pack 2 by adwitr (itch.io)
Pixel Explosion by NYKNCK (itch.io)
Pixel Health Bar Asset Pack by adwitr (itch.io)
https://maou.audio/bgm_cyber44/

moreInfo.Tags: 2D

game.short_text: Vimjam2 Protoytpe
game.title: Your Own Worst Enemy

details.title: Your Own Worst Enemy
details.description:
Your Own Worst Enemy is my entry into VImJam 2021. The Core concept is that you build your own boss, by selecting different combinations of "mutations". The more mutations the more Exp and Coins you get, but also the harder it becomes. The game will test your skill, reaction, and luck. The Experience points are used for leveling while. Coins allow the player to but their own mutations to make them stronger.  There are also some secrets to find. Beware this game is a little tricky.
CONTROLS
WASD to move
Left Click to attack
And Space or shift to dash to the mouse position.
P.S After playing through the game for the first time or wanting to get right to the action you can press P at the start of the game and it'll skip the tutorial and cutscenes.

game.short_text: Survive the stress from an office job and try to not lose your mind!
game.title: Office Hours

details.title: Office Hours
details.description:
Office jobs can often be boring, but with an abusive boss, it becomes almost a survival challenge!
You must survive through the office hours, on the edge of losing your mind to the pressure. You must find ways to relieve yourself of work stress without being caught by your boss!
In this puzzle-survival, you must take risks to relieve stress and don't lose your mind until the end of the day.



Diversifiers
This game was made as a submission for VimJam2: Boss, and follows the following diversifier challenges:
Doing Your Part - Contribute at least one asset from the game to https://opengameart.org/ (https://opengameart.org/content/office-8x8-tileset)
Everything is Tiny - Limit sprites and tiles to 8x8 pixels
Transcend Language - The game has no text (other than title and credits)

How To Play
You must get to the end of the work day without losing your mind to stress!
Use arrows or WASD to move. Use E to interact.
Some areas in the office relieve stress (green), while others accelerate it (red).
If the boss spots you relaxing or spots your desk without you around, he will complain at you and highly accelerate your stress until you get back to work.
Find ways to relieve stress along the work day without your boss noticing and keep your mental health!

moreInfo.Author: Danielfib

game.short_text: created in 10 days for vimjam2.  Top down silly shooter.
game.title: Assistant to the Regional Monster

details.title: Assistant to the Regional Monster
details.description:
Created in 10 day for vimjam2. 
QUICK TIPS: HOLD the fire button down to shoot (never let go, just like Jack.  Tapping is not fun).  Your mouse or joystick controls the camera.
 Play as eyeball face, an assistant to the regional monster at the local terror firm. Only the boss is well, a monster.  And a little on the edge today.  Complete all your tasks quickly or there's gonna be trouble.  
What tasks you say? Well, there is a timer, you need to complete all the task before it runs out or lose your job.  The tasks are completed by returning to the boss after collecting the requested item.
If you die a few times, I would recommend a browser refresh (pretty sure it gets buggy)

Controller Recommended
Move = left joystick
shoot = right trigger
aim = right joystick

Keyboard
Move = arrow keys or wasd
shoot = mouse click
aim = mouse

Credits
Art/Code: clemonades
Music and Sound Effects: Joel Steudler / joel@joelsteudlermusic.com
Title Font
